text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Who do you think will win today? I really have no
idea...

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
It'll be Teio, right? But then, McQueen's racing
too... And Rice Shower's been on fire recently...

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but I think Bourbon's got this! Remember
her race against Teio?

text_block_list.name: Short-haired Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's got high expectations for you,
Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Short-haired Reporter
text_block_list.text: Do your best out there!

While excitement and anticipation fill the stands,
the waiting area is quiet and still.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I'm looking forward to today's race.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
When I visualize everyone running on the turf, I
can feel a sharp rise in "excitement."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Today... I'm definitely going to win.

As we wait for the race to start, a small tap on the
door catches our attention.
Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hi, Bourbon... Um, is this a bad time?
Rice Shower has come to see Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I've realized something... Before, I never really
felt the desire to win as strongly as I do now.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I just wanted to become someone who could
bring people happiness. But before I knew it...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
In the middle of trying to catch up to you, I
started wanting to actually win.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I kept thinking how I wanted to pass you and beat
you. Those thoughts pushed me to become
stronger.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
If it wasn't for you, I wouldn't be where I am right
now.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I... haven't done anything.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: No, you taught me all of that.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That's why... I just wanted to say thanks, before
we race today. So...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Bourbon.

Watching Rice Shower bow her head, Mihono
Bourbon begins to quietly speak.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...I know that you have been working harder than
anyone.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I also know you have the strength to stand up
regardless of how many times you fall.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the Kikuka Sho... I learned
something as well when you expressed your
"desire to win."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I discovered my own "desire to win." That's why
I'm standing here today.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: It's thanks to you, Rice.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
And with that said, I won't go easy on you today.
Let's have a good race.

Rice Shower clasps Bourbon's extended hand
tightly.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Right!
Without further ado, the Arima Kinen begins.
